questions.text: What happens when dilute hydrochloric acid is added to iron filings?
options: Hydrogen gas and iron chloride are produced
Chlorine gas and iron hydroxide are produced
Iron salt and water are produced
questions.correctAnswer: Hydrogen gas and iron chloride are produced
questions.explanation: Fe + 2HCl → FeCl2 + H2. Iron reacts with dilute HCl to produce iron(II) chloride and hydrogen gas. This is a displacement reaction.

questions.text: What does one mean by exothermic and endothermic reactions?
questions.correctAnswer: Exothermic reactions release heat; endothermic reactions absorb heat.
questions.explanation: Exothermic reactions release energy (heat) to surroundings (e.g., combustion). Endothermic reactions absorb energy from surroundings (e.g., photosynthesis).
Cellular respiration (C6H12O6 + 6O2 → 6CO2 + 6H2O + energy) releases energy, making it an exothermic reaction. This energy is used by our body.

questions.text: When carbon dioxide is passed through lime water, it turns milky due to formation of ________.
questions.explanation: CO2 + Ca(OH)2 → CaCO3 + H2O. Calcium carbonate is insoluble and forms a white precipitate, making the lime water turn milky.
